message:
ci: fix workflow failures

- Update macOS-13 runner to macOS-15 (macOS-13 is retired)
- Fix dtolnay/rust-toolchain action usage with @master and toolchain param
- Update codecov-action to v5 (pinned SHA was not found)
- Fix duplicate 'with:' blocks from toolchain action update

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,8 +26,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly
           components: rustfmt, clippy
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
@@ -88,7 +89,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
@@ -137,14 +140,16 @@ jobs:
           - name: macOS ARM64
             os: macos-14
           - name: macOS x64
-            os: macos-13
+            os: macos-15
           - name: Windows x64
             os: windows-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
@@ -175,7 +180,9 @@ jobs:
 
       # Note: Update this when MSRV changes. Edition 2024 requires nightly.
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
@@ -194,7 +201,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
 
       - name: Install cargo-audit
         uses: taiki-e/install-action@735e5933943122c5ac182670a935f54a949265c1 # v2.52.4
@@ -213,7 +222,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
@@ -239,7 +250,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
@@ -268,8 +281,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly
           components: llvm-tools-preview
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
@@ -288,7 +302,7 @@ jobs:
           cargo llvm-cov report --all-features --workspace --html --output-dir coverage-html
 
       - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
-        uses: codecov/codecov-action@1e68e06f1dbfde0e4cefc87efeba9e4643565f39 # v5.1.2
+        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v5
         with:
           files: lcov.info
           fail_ci_if_error: false
